name: fincrime-secured-mcp
description: Open-source agentic fraud-investigation copilot with auth, RBAC, and audit plumbing. Federated MCP gateway fronts six downstream MCP servers behind PASETO-authenticated, RBAC-enforced calls.

plugins.name: fraud-investigator
plugins.description: Agentic fraud-investigation copilot. Orchestrator + 5 subskills + verifier meta-skill, talking through a PASETO + RBAC + audit MCP gateway to six federated downstream MCP servers.
